options.query:
SELECT 
  transaction_id,
  customer_id,
  order_id,
  product_id,
  customer_name,
  customer_email,
  region,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  total_amount,
  discount_amount,
  tax_amount,
  transaction_date,
  transaction_time,
  payment_method,
  payment_status,
  order_status,
  fulfillment_priority,
  shipping_address,
  billing_address,
  notes,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE transaction_id = :transaction_id::INTEGER

SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_revenue
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')

SELECT 
  order_status,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')
GROUP BY order_status
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as high_priority_count
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE fulfillment_priority IN ('High', 'Urgent')
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')

SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN payment_status = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) as completed_payments,
  COUNT(*) as total_payments,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(CASE WHEN payment_status = 'Completed' THEN 1 END)::NUMERIC / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100, 
    2
  ) as completion_rate
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')

SELECT 
  transaction_date,
  SUM(total_amount) as daily_revenue
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')
GROUP BY transaction_date
ORDER BY transaction_date ASC

SELECT 
  order_status,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')
GROUP BY order_status
ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT 
  region,
  SUM(total_amount) as revenue,
  COUNT(*) as order_count
FROM customer_order_transactions
WHERE 1=1
  AND (COALESCE(:order_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR order_status = :order_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:region::TEXT, '') = '' OR region = :region::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:fulfillment_priority::TEXT, '') = '' OR fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:payment_status::TEXT, '') = '' OR payment_status = :payment_status::TEXT)
  AND (COALESCE(:start_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date >= :start_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:end_date::TEXT, '') = '' OR transaction_date <= :end_date::DATE)
  AND (COALESCE(:search_term::TEXT, '') = '' OR 
       customer_name ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%' OR 
       customer_email ILIKE '%' || :search_term::TEXT || '%')
GROUP BY region
ORDER BY revenue DESC

UPDATE customer_order_transactions
SET 
  order_status = :order_status::TEXT,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE transaction_id = :transaction_id::INTEGER

UPDATE customer_order_transactions
SET 
  fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE transaction_id = :transaction_id::INTEGER

UPDATE customer_order_transactions
SET 
  order_status = :order_status::TEXT,
  fulfillment_priority = :fulfillment_priority::TEXT,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE transaction_id = :transaction_id::INTEGER
